Package dev.morphia.critter.parser.gizmo

Class GizmoEntityModelGenerator

java.lang.Object
dev.morphia.critter.parser.gizmo.BaseGizmoGenerator
dev.morphia.critter.parser.gizmo.GizmoEntityModelGenerator
public class GizmoEntityModelGenerator extends BaseGizmoGenerator
Generates a Gizmo-based CritterEntityModel implementation for a Morphia entity class.

  • Field Summary

    Fields inherited from class dev.morphia.critter.parser.gizmo.BaseGizmoGenerator

    baseName, critterClassLoader, entity, generatedType

    Creates a new entity model generator for the given entity.

  • Constructor Details

    • GizmoEntityModelGenerator

      public GizmoEntityModelGenerator(Mapper mapper, Class<?> type, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, org.objectweb.asm.tree.ClassNode classNode, List<PropertyModelGenerator> properties)
      Creates a new entity model generator for the given entity.
      Parameters:
      mapper - the Morphia mapper
      type - the entity class annotated with @Entity
      critterClassLoader - the class loader that will receive the generated bytecode
      classNode - the ASM class node for the entity
      properties - the property model generators for each of the entity's properties
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the entity class does not have an @Entity annotation

  • Method Details

    • annotation

      public <T extends Annotation> T annotation(Class<T> type)
      Returns the annotation of the given type from the entity class, or null if not present.
      Type Parameters:
      T - the annotation type
      Parameters:
      type - the annotation class to look up
      Returns:
      the annotation instance, or null

    • getGeneratedType

      public String getGeneratedType()
      Returns the fully-qualified name of the generated entity model class.
      Returns:
      the generated class name

    • emit

      public GizmoEntityModelGenerator emit()
      Emits the generated entity model class and returns this generator.
      Returns:
      this generator after emitting
